---
name: Security Report
about: Report a security vulnerability (DO NOT use for general bugs)
title: "[SECURITY] "
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

**IMPORTANT: Do NOT use this template for general bugs or feature requests.**

**For security vulnerabilities, please email the maintainers directly instead of opening a public issue.**

See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for responsible disclosure instructions.

---

If you're reporting a non-sensitive security concern (e.g., missing security headers, dependency vulnerabilities), you can use this template.

## Type of Security Issue

- [ ] Dependency vulnerability
- [ ] Missing security header
- [ ] Insecure configuration
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Description

A clear and concise description of the security concern.

## Affected Component

- [ ] Frontend (React)
- [ ] Backend (Rust/Tauri)
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Gateway
- [ ] Other

## Severity

- [ ] Critical — Remote code execution, data exfiltration
- [ ] High — Authentication bypass, privilege escalation
- [ ] Medium — Information disclosure, denial of service
- [ ] Low — Best practice violations

## Mitigation

If you have a suggested fix, describe it here.
